name: Green Beans with Tomatoes and Honey
recipeIngredient: 1 lb green beans, trimmed, cut crosswise into 1/2 inch pieces
1 can (16 oz) plum tomatoes, drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans in a vegetable steamer with water. Steam until the beans turn very bright green but are still crunchy, about 5 minutes.
2. Rinse the beans under cold running water in the steamer basket; drain.
3. Heat the olive oil in a wide shallow saucepan. Add the onion and garlic; sauté until softened for about 5 minutes.
4. Add the cinnamon, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne. Sauté for 1 minute.
5. Add the tomatoes and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently to prevent sticking, for 8-10 minutes, until it has a thick jam-like consistency.
6. Stir in the honey and lemon juice. Add the beans. Cover; lower heat; cook at a low simmer, stirring occasionally, until the beans are tender, about 15 minutes.
7. Season with remaining salt if necessary.
